articles.title: Mexico's most wanted drug lord 'El Mencho' killed in military operation
articles.summary: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as "El Mencho", headed one of Mexico's most powerful drug cartels.

articles.title: Armed man killed after entering secure perimeter of Trump's residence, Secret Service says
articles.summary: The suspect was carrying a shotgun and fuel can when he was killed, officers said. Trump was in Washington DC at the time.

articles.title: Pakistan launches deadly strikes on Afghanistan
articles.summary: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

articles.title: Bones of St Francis of Assisi go on public display in Italy
articles.summary: The remains of Italy's patron saint have only been seen in public once before - for one day in 1978.

articles.title: Trump curious why Iran has not 'capitulated', US envoy Witkoff says
articles.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff says the president is puzzled why Iran has not yet compromised in the face of a major American military build-up nearby.

articles.title: US ambassador's Israel comments condemned by Arab and Muslim nations

articles.title: Explosions kill police officer and injure 25 in western Ukraine
articles.summary: Twenty-five people were injured by explosions overnight in what officials are calling a terror attack.

articles.title: More than 1,500 Venezuelan political prisoners apply for amnesty
articles.summary: The announcement by the head of Venezuela's National Assembly comes amid US pressure following the capture of ex-President Nicolás Maduro.

articles.title: Willie Colón, trombonist who pioneered salsa music, dies aged 75
articles.summary: His career spanned 60 years and dozens of albums and had been named among the most influential Latino artists of all time.
